'''Capper''' was a member of the [[BloodScar]] traffic control on [[Gepparin]]. When [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited [[the Commodore]], Capper told her where to land.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
